description: Mobile App Shell (quant-mobile) enhancement with React component screens + Status Page UI components + Marketing Site premium pages - bottom navigation, app launcher grid, push notifications, status dashboard with uptime bars, marketing hero with animated features, pricing table, testimonials carousel
steps: quant-mobile: Create apps/quant-mobile/src/components/BottomNavigation.tsx - 5-tab bottom nav (Home, Search, Create, Notifications, Profile) with active indicator animation, badge count on notifications.
quant-mobile: Create apps/quant-mobile/src/components/AppLauncherGrid.tsx - grid of all Quant apps with icons, names, long-press for quick actions menu, drag to rearrange.
quant-mobile: Create apps/quant-mobile/src/components/NotificationCenter.tsx - grouped notifications by app, swipe to dismiss, mark all read button, notification type icons.
quant-mobile: Create apps/quant-mobile/src/components/DeepLinkRouter.tsx - route component that maps deep link patterns to app screens with transition animations.
quant-mobile: Create apps/quant-mobile/src/components/OfflineBanner.tsx - connectivity status banner with sync progress indicator, retry button, offline mode label.

Status Page: Create apps/status/src/components/StatusDashboard.tsx - service health grid with color-coded status dots (green/yellow/red), response time sparklines, overall status header (All Systems Operational / Partial Outage / Major Outage).
Status Page: Create apps/status/src/components/UptimeBars.tsx - 90-day uptime bar per service showing daily green/yellow/red segments, hover for details tooltip, percentage label.
Status Page: Create apps/status/src/components/IncidentTimeline.tsx - timeline of incidents with severity badges, status updates nested under each incident, resolved/investigating/monitoring states.
Status Page: Create apps/status/src/components/SubscribeForm.tsx - email/webhook subscription form for status updates, frequency selector (all/major only).

Marketing: Enhance apps/marketing/src/pages/HomePage.tsx - convert to JSX with animated hero section (gradient text, floating product screenshots with parallax), feature grid with hover cards, social proof counter (users/messages/files), CTA button with pulse animation.

Marketing: Enhance apps/marketing/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx - pricing cards (Free/Pro/Enterprise) with feature comparison table, toggle monthly/annual, highlighted recommended plan, enterprise contact CTA.
Marketing: Create apps/marketing/src/components/TestimonialCarousel.tsx - auto-rotating testimonial cards with company logos, quote text, author photo, dot navigation.
Marketing: Create apps/marketing/src/components/ComparisonTable.tsx - Quant vs Google vs Microsoft comparison table with checkmark/x for features, highlighting Quant advantages.
Marketing: Enhance apps/marketing/src/components/Footer.tsx - multi-column footer with product links, company links, legal links, social media icons, newsletter signup.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck passes for quant-mobile, status, marketing
pnpm test passes for all affected apps
BottomNavigation has 5 tabs with proper aria labels
StatusDashboard shows service grid with health indicators
Marketing HomePage has animated hero and feature grid
PricingPage has 3 plan cards with feature comparison
